title: App's Billing section doesn't load properly
excerpt:
Hi everyone. 
It seems that today the App’s Billing section doesn’t load properly. 
  
Is it just me (or General Caster) or are you experiencing the same problems? 
Thanks. 
cc @Matias.Monday

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
